name: Shadcn Space Admin Dashboard Shell
description: A comprehensive responsive admin dashboard layout template containing collapsible navigation menus, KPI cards, and activity feeds.
code:
import { useState } from 'react'; import { BarChart3, Bell, LayoutDashboard, Search, Settings, Users } from 'lucide-react'; export function AdminDashboardShell() { const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(true); const stats = [ { label: "Monthly Recurring Revenue", value: "$24,892", change: "+12.3% from last month" }, { label: "Active Developer Seats", value: "1,248", change: "+8.4% from last week" }, { label: "Average Server Latency", value: "42ms", change: "-4% (optimal)" } ]; return (
{/* Sidebar Panel */}
{sidebarOpen ? ShadcnSpace : S}
{/* Main Layout Area */}
{/* Header */}
{/* Dashboard Content */}
{stats.map((stat) => (
{stat.label}

{stat.value}

{stat.change}
))}
); }

name: Shadcn Space Analytics Card Grid

name: Shadcn Space Multi-step Registration
